title: Dungeon Defenders: Awakened
description: Gameplay and systems programming at Chromatic Games: built the passive-ability system powering hundreds of abilities, the cross-platform DLC unlocking system, and an in-game store. Sole programmer on the PS4/PS5 port and rewrote the multiplayer session code across all platforms.

title: Dungeon Defenders: Going Rogue
description: Feature and systems work at Chromatic Games, including UI, abilities, characters, and boss AI (including the Lycan King fight) on the studio's roguelike entry in the Dungeon Defenders franchise.

title: Dungeon Defenders 2 — Backend
description: Spearheaded upgrades to the live Dungeon Defenders 2 backend (C#/AWS/MySQL) and built a serverless Twitch Drops system using AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, and API Gateway.

title: Primiri Training Tool
description: Lead programmer on a training/simulation tool at RhinoCorps. Built a RuntimeImporter plugin in Unreal 4 (FBX SDK + Assimp) for loading 3D models at runtime and drove AutoCAD-to-3D pipeline improvements that cut VRAM usage by 40%.
